news.title:
Rising input costs, West Asia conflict, and weak rupee pressure FMCG margins; durable goods firms plan price hikes.
FMCG firms to stagger price hikes starting with 3-4% in April; urban FMCG value growth contracts by 4-5% in March.
news.summary:
Rising input costs, West Asia conflict, and weak rupee pressure FMCG margins; durable goods firms plan price hikes.
FMCG firms to stagger price hikes starting with 3-4% in April; urban FMCG value growth contracts by 4-5% in March.

news.title:
Dabur India Ltd announces NCLT-directed meeting on May 2, 2026, for unsecured creditors.
Meeting aims to consider and approve the Scheme of Amalgamation with Sesa Care Pvt Ltd.
news.summary:
Dabur India Ltd announces NCLT-directed meeting on May 2, 2026, for unsecured creditors.

news.title:
FMCG firms face rising packaging costs due to higher crude oil prices and rupee depreciation.
Rationalising of commercial LPG impacts production in some sectors amid the West Asia conflict.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs lists Dabur India among top 7 quality stocks to buy.
Dabur India shares fell 18% in a month, 14% YTD, and 19% in 3 years.

news.title:

news.title:
Dabur India to hold Board meeting on May 7, 2026, to review audited financial results.
The Board will also consider recommending a final dividend for FY ending March 31, 2026.
news.summary:
Dabur India to hold Board meeting on May 7, 2026, to review audited financial results.

news.title:
MOSL maintains Neutral rating on Dabur India; target price ₹515.
India recovery steady, e-commerce sales ~50%; RM costs, EPS cuts pose challenges.

FMCG majors like HUL, Marico, Dabur actively acquiring D2C brands.

news.title:

news.title:
Dabur India acquires minority stake in RAS Beauty for Rs 60 Cr.
RAS Beauty shows 75% 3-year CAGR and Rs 100 Cr ARR; Dabur's first Rs 500 Cr fund investment.
news.summary:

news.title:
Top FMCG advertisers like HUL, P&G, Marico, and Colgate reduced Q3 ad spends by 6%, 17%, 2%, and 8%, respectively.
Experts predict ad spend recovery by Holi, potentially boosting entertainment platform revenues.

The target price set for Dabur India is Rs 400.

news.title:
FMCG firms like Hindustan Unilever, Tata Consumer, Dabur hike prices up to 5% due to rising costs.

news.title:
Dabur elevates Mohit Malhotra to Global CEO and appoints Herjit Bhalla as India CEO, effective April 2026.
Dabur reported Q3 net profit of ₹553.6 crore, up 7.3% YoY; rural demand outperformed urban markets for 8th consecutive quarter.
news.summary:
Dabur elevates Mohit Malhotra to Global CEO and appoints Herjit Bhalla as India CEO, effective April 2026.
Dabur reported Q3 net profit of ₹553.6 crore, up 7.3% YoY; rural demand outperformed urban markets for 8th consecutive quarter.

news.title:
